# Sow2Grow

> A global tribal marketplace where sowers plant seeds, bestowers fund growth, and orchards turn community support into sustainable impact. USDC is the settlement currency. AI agents — publicly called "Orchard Companions" — help members run their orchards.

Sow2Grow uses a sacred terminology: **Sow** (plant a seed/idea), **Bestow** (fund a sower), **Orchard** (a sower's living tribe), **Seed** (a fundable project). The Directory lists products for sale; Orchards is where the sower journey and tribe live — they are intentionally distinct destinations.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Landing page introducing the Sow2Grow tribal marketplace.
- [Browse Orchards](/browse-orchards): Discover sower orchards and their living tribes.
- [Bulk Directory](/bulk/directory): Sower directory grouped by tribe and category.
- [Wandering Directory](/wandering-directory): Marketplace filtered by the nine wandering badges (seller identities).
- [Products](/products): The Sow2Grow product marketplace.
- [Factories](/factories): Directory of tribal factories and bulk producers.
- [Sow2Grow Calendar](/sow2grow-calendar): The sacred bead calendar — Enoch / Ezekiel identity revealer.
- [Tequfah Clock](/tequfah-clock): Live sacred-time clock based on observed Jerusalem sunrise.
- [Live Rooms](/live-rooms): Active live community rooms.
- [Live Lounge](/live-lounge): Always-on community lounge.
- [Premium Rooms](/premium-rooms): Ambassador-only premium rooms.
- [Community Videos](/community-videos): Member-submitted videos.
- [Music Library](/music-library): Community music library.
- [Radio](/radio): Sow2Grow live radio.
- [Radio Sessions](/radio-sessions): Past and upcoming radio sessions.
- [Grove Feed](/grove-feed): Live grove activity and orchard updates.
- [Companions](/companions): Orchard Companions hub (Gentoo, Mint, Debian, Tux, Ubuntu, Kali, Fedora, Arch).
- [Community Offering](/community-offering): Free-will community offerings.
- [Tithing](/tithing): Tithing flow.
- [Free-Will Gifting](/free-will-gifting): Direct gifting to sowers.
- [Support Us](/support-us): Support Sow2Grow with Binance Pay (USDC).
- [Tribal Hearts](/tribal-hearts): Ambassador-only safe heterosexual dating garden (18+).

## Optional

- [Login](/login): Sign in.
- [Register](/register): Create an account and start your sower journey.
- [Search](/search): Site search.
